warnings.name: Lake Eildon
warnings.status: Warning — high blue-green algae levels detected. Avoid contact with the water, use alternative supplies for stock, and keep pets away.

warnings.status: Warning — high blue-green algae levels detected. Avoid contact with the water, use alternative supplies for stock, and keep pets away.

warnings.name: Tullaroop Reservoir
warnings.status: Warning — high blue-green algae levels detected. Avoid contact with the water, use alternative supplies for stock, and keep pets away.

warnings.name: Hepburns Lagoon
warnings.status: Warning — avoid contact with the water, including the Hepburns Race.

news.title: Goulburn-Murray Water has 4 lakes under an active warning (Eildon, Eppalock, Tullaroop, Hepburns Lagoon)
